scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r fonts dist/ && npx tailwindcss -i input.css -o dist/style.css --minify && terser cat.js -o dist/cat.js --compress --mangle --comments false && sed 's|<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>|<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">|g' index.html > dist/index.html
